title: schlumbergera × exotica
intro: Schlumbergera × exotica, also known as Christmas Cactus or Holiday Cactus, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Schlumbergera genus, primarily found in Brazil. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including the presence of flavonoids and saponins, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Consuming Schlumbergera × exotica has been associated with various health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels and reducing blood pressure, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas or infusions to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
